sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104633" key="traxude/rmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρᾱχῠ-δέρμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n104633.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rough-skinned,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
